news.headline: Ethereum delays Pectra upgrade, sets up Hoodi testnet. Pectra may go live on mainnet by April 25 with over 10 EIPs.
news.summary: Ethereum core developers are introducing a third testnet named Hoodi to assess the Pectra upgrade after initial bugs. Pectra's mainnet launch is delayed to late April, to be activated on Hoodi on March 26. If successful, Pectra could go live on Ethereum mainnet by April 25, enhancing wallets and user experience with 10 Improvement Proposals. The upgrade aims to double the blob count for data availability and was initially set for a late 2024 launch. Galaxy Digital plans to mimic the Ethereum mainnet's operation on Hoodi, distributing at least 20 million test staked-Ether across 11 client teams and five staking operators. The third testnet is part of Ethereum's quicker upgrade deployment strategy to stay competitive in the blockchain sector.

Pineapple Inc. announces expansion into cannabis and functional mushrooms to boost growth and profit. 2025 targets discussed.
news.summary: A company is venturing into the cannabis business management and functional mushroom markets to boost its growth and profitability. This strategic move aims to tap into the rapidly growing industries, with the global cannabis market projected to reach $73.6 billion by 2027 and the functional mushroom market expected to increase to $34.3 billion by 2028. By diversifying its portfolio, the company is positioning itself to capitalize on these lucrative markets and enhance its financial performance.

news.headline: S&P 500 enters correction territory as Treasuries rise. Market update: The Close 03/13/2025.
news.summary: The S&P 500 index experienced a sharp decline, entering into a correction phase, while treasury bonds saw an increase in value on March 13, 2025. This signifies a significant drop of at least 10% from recent highs in the stock market. Specific percentage figures were not provided in the original text.

GUESS?, Inc. and WHP Global partner with Signal Brands to expand rag & bone accessories business for 5 years.
news.summary: Guess?, Inc. and WHP Global have partnered with Signal Brands to collaborate on expanding rag & bone's handbags and small leather goods category over the next five years. rag & bone, a prominent fashion brand founded in New York in 2002, has a strong presence in the American fashion industry. The partnership aims to enhance the brand's offerings and reach a wider audience through Signal Brands, a trusted licensee partner of GUESS. This collaboration signifies a strategic move to capitalize on the success and reputation of rag & bone in the market.

Ryoncil® pricing info now in all US drug compendia; Mesoblast lists NDC codes and kit pricing.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, Mesoblast Limited revealed that pricing details for Ryoncil® are now listed in all four primary drug pricing compendia in the US. As a top provider of allogeneic cellular medicines for inflammatory conditions, Mesoblast Limited is known by its stock symbols Nasdaq:MESO and ASX:MSB. The compendia offer essential data for purchasing the product, such as manufacturing specifics, National Drug Codes (NDC) for kit procurement, and pricing of the kits.

Fear of catastrophe looms as wine businesses face potential 200% tariffs on European wines, impacting all levels of the industry.
news.summary: President Trump has proposed imposing steep 200 percent tariffs on European wines, a move that could have negative impacts on importers, distributors, retailers, and restaurants. This threat does not guarantee assistance for U.S. wine producers and may potentially harm the industry as a whole.

Global polyclonal antibody market set to reach US$2.0 billion by 2034, fueled by growth in research and therapeutics. Major players driving innovation include Good Biotech Corp, Abcam Limited, and Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. Integration of AI and biotechnology expected to create new opportunities. Biological industry adapting to advanced antibody therapies with rise in chronic diseases. Governmanets and private organizations funding immunology research also contributing to market growth.
news.summary: The global polyclonal antibodies market is expected to grow from around US$1.1 billion in 2023 to approximately US$2.0 billion by 2034, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.5%. This growth is attributed to factors like the increasing prevalence of chronic diseases, advancements in antibody production technologies, and rising investments in research and development in the biotechnology and pharmaceutical sectors. The demand for polyclonal antibodies in treating cancer, autoimmune disorders, and infectious diseases is also driving market growth. The emergence of AI-driven drug discovery and biotechnology innovations is creating lucrative opportunities. Various key players in the market are actively involved in strategic collaborations, acquisitions, and product innovations to stay competitive. This growth is further supported by governmental and private organizations funding research in immunology and precision medicine. Major companies in this market include Good Biotech Corp, Rockland Immunochemicals, Inc., EpigenTek Group Inc., and others, who are expanding their portfolios to stay ahead in the market.

Liquid Web introduces encrypted cross-region private networking in all bare metal hosting plans, enhancing security and compliance.
news.summary: Starting from March 13, 2025, Liquid Web, a renowned provider of dedicated servers, WordPress, and VPS, will include a new built-in feature in all bare metal hosting plans. This feature aims to address crucial security issues that are frequently neglected while also assisting in compliance with regulatory standards. Operating from ATLANTA, this initiative is set to enhance user experience and ensure a safer online environment.

news.headline: WA Poison Center announces 2025 Poster Contest Winners. 19th annual contest crowns 4 winners. Notable: Natalie Lundsten, 1st grader.
news.summary: Seattle, WA - March 13, 2025 - The Washington Poison Center (WAPC), a nonprofit in Washington offering free medical guidance on poisoning and drug overdoses, has revealed the victorious participants of its 19th annual Poison Prevention Poster Contest. Among the winners is Natalie Lundsten, a talented 1st-grade student, showcasing the creativity and commitment to raising awareness about poisoning prevention. This initiative continues to inspire young minds, with a total of four winners awarded this year for their outstanding contributions.

Mount Logan Capital Inc. achieved $15.3M SRE and $7.5M FRE in 2024, with significant growth in revenue.Entered into a merger with 180 Degree Capital Corp and a deal with Runway Growth Capital LLC. Declared C$0.02 dividend and enhanced dividend tax credit for shareholders. Total capital at $150.3M and consolidated net income before taxes at $6.1M for 2024.(Note: Character count is 438, difficult to summarize in 100 characters without losing important details)
news.summary: Mount Logan Capital Inc. reported strong financial results for the year ended December 31, 2024. The insurance segment generated $15.3 million in Spread Related Earnings (SRE), a significant increase from the previous year. The asset management segment also saw growth, with $7.5 million in Fee Related Earnings (FRE), a 36% increase. Total revenue for the asset management segment was $15.7 million, driven by fee growth. Total assets managed for Ability Insurance Company reached $620.1 million. The company also completed a minority investment in Runway Growth Capital LLC, an asset manager with $1.3 billion AUM. Mount Logan's total capital was $150.3 million, with net income of $6.1 million, up from a loss in the previous year. The company declared a shareholder distribution and announced a merger with 180 Degree Capital Corp. and an investment in Runway. Adjusted basic EPS was $0.46 for 2024. Management is optimistic about the future, focusing on strategic acquisitions and organic growth.

news.headline: DeFi apps might 'unlock billions in BTC liquidity', offering Bitcoin holders more opportunities for financing & lending.
news.summary: Bitcoin holders are increasingly utilizing decentralized finance (DeFi) applications to leverage their holdings, enabling them to use Bitcoin as collateral for loans and earn yield by lending out the asset. This trend reflects a growing interest in decentralized financial services among cryptocurrency users.

Innodata boosts AI programs for companies & govt. Agencies; IBD SmartSelect rating rises from 94 to 97.
news.summary: Innodata's IBD SmartSelect Composite Rating rose significantly from 94 to 97 on Wednesday. The company specializes in assisting enterprises and government agencies in training and developing artificial intelligence (AI) programs. This increase in the rating highlights Innodata's strong performance and potential for growth in this sector.

news.summary: On March 13, 2025, in Dallas, Nanoscope Therapeutics Inc., a biotech firm dedicated to enhancing vision for those experiencing blindness or vision loss from retinal degenerative diseases, revealed Sulagna Bhattacharya as the Chief Executive Officer and Co-Founder.

news.headline: Angel reaches milestone with 1 million guild members in 170 countries supporting film & TV content.
news.summary: In a significant development, the film & TV tech platform Angel, curated by the Angel Guild in PROVO, Utah, has garnered support from more than 1 million individuals across 170 countries. This milestone highlights the widespread backing for films, series, filmmakers, and entertainment content that promotes positivity and enlightenment. This substantial support underscores the platform's success in attracting a large audience, emphasizing the global reach and impact of Angel.
